_doc: Example tinygpt.project.json — per-project model + dataset pins. Read by `tinygpt pull` and `tinygpt validate`. See docs/prds/B31-gallery-and-project-pins.md for the schema.
name: example-pace-project

eval._doc: Optional B32 eval-gate spec. `tinygpt eval-gate` reads this as zero-config. threshold/default_threshold are in percentage points; per-suite `command` writes EvalCompare.Row JSONL to $TINYGPT_EVAL_OUT.
